data.title: Enverus's 2026 Global Energy Outlook discusses commodity price pressure, strain on power systems, and oil market shifts, with a focus on changing U.S. load expectations and Venezuela's long-term oil supply potential. Selective investments across the energy transition are highlighted.
data.description: Enverus, a prominent energy SaaS and analytics platform, is set to release its annual analysis on Jan. 13, 2026, highlighting fluctuations in U.S. load expectations. The report also sheds light on the growing long-term oil supply potential in Venezuela. Moreover, Enverus will discuss strategic investments made across the energy transition landscape. Stay tuned for insights into these developments.

data.title: remedi aims for 2026 recycling goals, promising healthcare cost savings with landfill diversion.
data.description: A fully permitted regulated medical waste processor, remedi, based in San Antonio, announced on January 13, 2026, how its recycling initiatives will contribute to achieving landfill diversion targets for the year. By utilizing recycling practices, the company aims to divert a significant amount of medical waste from landfills without imposing any additional financial strain. This innovative approach emphasizes sustainability in waste management and aims to significantly reduce the environmental impact of medical waste disposal.

data.title: Perricone MD relaunches Neuropeptide Collection with two serums for lifting and wrinkle reduction; 30 years of research.
data.description: In San Francisco on January 13, 2026, Perricone MD revealed the reemergence of its Neuropeptide Collection, introducing a range of advanced skincare products aimed at combatting signs of aging. Backed by almost three decades of extensive research, the collection offers clinically proven solutions that visibly reduce the most developed indicators of aging.

CLINTONS TO TESTIFY IN EPSTEIN PROBE Bill and Hillary Clinton are scheduled to testify Tuesday in Congress’s investigation of Jeffrey Epstein, with Republicans warning they could face contempt charges if they do not appear.

data.title: Naval weapon systems market report predicts trends until 2033, focusing on modern, multi-domain combat solutions.
data.description: A new report titled "Naval Weapon Systems - Market and Technology Forecast to 2033" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report delves into the transformation of traditional naval weapon systems into advanced, multi-domain combat solutions. It analyzes the technological progress embraced by top navies and the impact of these developments on market trends and prospective demand. The study highlights the significance of global modernization initiatives in shaping the market, with a focus on how these changes are driving future demand.

data.title: December core CPI inflation stays at 2.6%, lifting Fed rate-cut chances, boosting S&P 500 futures.
data.description: In December, there was an unexpected stability in core CPI inflation, remaining at a modest rate of 2.6%. This development has led to an increase in S&P 500 futures and raised the likelihood of a rate cut by the Federal Reserve. The data has been described as 'Goldilocks,' indicating a favorable balance. The situation is being closely monitored for any further changes or impacts on financial markets.
ESSILORLUXOTTICA - NEAR CURRENT 2026 TARGET FOR 10M META CAPACITY

data.title: Middle East e-commerce & payments report highlights growth trends in KSA, UAE, Israel with focus on AI impact by 2026.
data.description: A recent report titled "Middle East Digital Commerce & Payments in the Age of AI, 2025" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report delves into the impact of E-Commerce, digital payments, and artificial intelligence on the retail and financial sectors in the Middle East countries like Saudi Arabia, the UAE, Israel, Qatar, Kuwait, Iran, Jordan, Bahrain, and Oman. It highlights the increasing trend of online shopping and mobile-first purchasing in the region, with weekly online shopping showing significant growth.

data.title: Arrow Electronics is partnering with Romanian startup .lumen to scale production of AI glasses for the blind, replicating guide dog functions.
data.description: A partnership between Arrow Electronics and the Romanian startup.lumen has resulted in the development of AI glasses that mimic the essential tasks performed by guide dogs. These innovative wearable headsets aim to assist individuals in need by replicating key functions, enhancing their mobility and independence. This collaboration signifies a significant advancement in assistive technology, merging artificial intelligence with wearable devices to benefit users. This development showcases the potential impact of such partnerships in creating groundbreaking solutions.

data.title: NY non-profit alerts on scams related to 2026 prescription drug cap; serves 3.6M seniors; tackling Medicare fraud.
data.description: In Albany, New York on January 13, 2026, The New York StateWide Senior Action Council (StateWide) revealed its selection for Medicare Fraud of the Month. Established 54 years ago, StateWide is a non-profit entity committed to advocating for the interests and health of over 3.6 million senior residents in the state.

data.title: Batteries Plus climbs 10 spots to rank No. 281 on Entrepreneur Magazine's Franchise 500 list. Top battery service franchise.
data.description: A franchise specializing in battery and power solutions has seen a significant advancement, moving up 10 places to reach No. 281 on the latest rankings. Batteries Plus, based in HARTLAND, Wis., achieved this feat according to the report released on Jan. 13, 2026. The franchise is considered the nation's top service center in the industry, and its position on the list demonstrates its strong performance. The company has been included in the prestigious top 500 list, highlighting its growing influence and market presence.

data.title: TORAD Inc. achieves peak efficiency of 72.5% with spool compressor, addresses global warming. Enables commercial AC without emissions.
data.description: TORAD Inc., a company specializing in compressor technology, recently revealed a breakthrough achievement with their patented spool compressor, known as Zero-Global-Warming Solstice® ZE. The compressor has achieved an impressive peak efficiency of 72.5%, a milestone that paves the way for commercial air conditioning systems that won't contribute to global warming. This development was announced on January 13, 2026, marking a significant step towards environmentally friendly cooling solutions.
